testcase.name: test_admin_can_export_excel
testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_cannot_delete_last_superadmin
testcase.failure:
Tests\Feature\Admin\UserCrudTest::test_cannot_delete_last_superadmin Failed asserting that two strings are equal. --- Expected +++ Actual @@ @@ -'http://localhost/admin/users' +'http://localhost'

testcase.name: test_the_application_returns_a_successful_response
testcase.failure:
Tests\Feature\ExampleTest::test_the_application_returns_a_successful_response Expected response status code [200] but received 302. Failed asserting that 302 is identical to 200.
